EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user created the new process "{object.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} on behalf of the user {object.account.name} created the new process "{object.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the new process "{object.process.name}" on host {event_src.host}
